name: container
description: Fail-closed egress devcontainer: agent runs on an internal-only network and reaches the internet solely through an allow-listing proxy.

vars.ALLOWED_HOSTS: # one extended-regex host per line, e.g. (^|\.)crates\.io$

defaults.ALLOWED_HOSTS: # fail-closed default: no hosts beyond the curated baseline above. Add one extended-regex host per line to widen egress.
